common.siteDescription: No time to waste. Quick news summaries and free AI online tools.

home.heroDescription: No time to waste. Quick news summaries and free online tools.
home.newsDescription: Daily summaries of important news. Economy, technology, education, sports — everything at a glance.
home.toolsDescription: Free AI online tools. Text rewriting, grammar checking, PDF merging, image compression and more.

tools.pageDescription: PDF merger, image tools, text rewriting, JSON formatter and more. No registration needed. Fast, free and secure.

categories.pdfDesc: Merge, split, and compress PDF files
categories.imageDesc: Compress, resize, crop, and convert images
categories.devDesc: JSON, Base64, Regex, SQL, HTML, JS, CSV and more for developers
categories.generatorsDesc: Generate passwords, UUIDs, QR codes, gradients, emojis, and colors
categories.textDesc: Case converter, binary, ROT13, diff checker, timer, word count

ai-text-rewriter.name: AI Text Rewriter
ai-text-rewriter.description: Rewrite and paraphrase your text using AI. Change tone, simplify language, or make text more professional.

ai-text-summarizer.name: AI Text Summarizer
ai-text-summarizer.description: Summarize long text, articles, and documents using AI. Get concise summaries with key points.

ai-grammar-checker.name: AI Grammar Checker
ai-grammar-checker.description: Check and fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors using AI. Get instant corrections for your text.

pdf-merge.name: PDF Merge
pdf-merge.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one document online. Rearrange pages and combine PDFs in any order.

pdf-split.name: PDF Page Splitter
pdf-split.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF file online. Select page ranges to split and download.

pdf-compress.name: PDF Compressor
pdf-compress.description: Reduce PDF file size online. Remove metadata and optimize structure to compress PDFs.

image-compress.name: Image Compressor
image-compress.description: Compress and resize images online. Reduce file size while maintaining quality. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

image-convert.name: Image Converter
image-convert.description: Convert images between JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats online. Your files stay in your browser.

image-resize.name: Image Resizer
image-resize.description: Resize images to exact dimensions or by percentage online. Maintain aspect ratio, supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP.

image-crop.name: Image Cropper
image-crop.description: Crop images with a drag-to-select area online. Select any region and download the cropped result.

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter & Validator
json-formatter.description: Format, validate, and beautify your JSON data online. Minify or prettify JSON with syntax highlighting.

base64-encode-decode.name: Base64 Encode/Decode
base64-encode-decode.description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings online. Supports UTF-8 text and file encoding.

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test and debug regular expressions online with real-time matching. Highlight matches and view groups.

hash-generator.name: Hash Generator
hash-generator.description: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes from text online. Free cryptographic hash generator.

qr-code-generator.name: QR Code Generator
qr-code-generator.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, email, phone numbers, and more. Download as PNG or SVG.

color-picker.name: Color Picker & Palette Generator
color-picker.description: Pick colors, convert between HEX, RGB, HSL formats, and generate beautiful color palettes.

lorem-ipsum-generator.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Generate lorem ipsum placeholder text for your designs and mockups. Choose paragraphs, sentences, or words.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text. Estimate reading time.

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.description: Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and more.

slug-generator.name: Slug Generator
slug-generator.description: Generate clean URL slugs from any text. Remove special characters and create SEO-friendly URLs.

text-diff.name: Text Diff Checker
text-diff.description: Compare two texts and find differences. Highlight additions, deletions, and changes line by line.

html-entity-codec.name: HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder
html-entity-codec.description: Encode special characters to HTML entities or decode HTML entities back to text.

url-encode-decode.name: URL Encode/Decode
url-encode-decode.description: Encode or decode URL strings online. Convert special characters to percent-encoding or decode them.

jwt-decoder.name: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens (JWT) online. View header, payload, and expiration status.

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.description: Write and preview Markdown in real-time. Supports headings, lists, code blocks, and more.

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Supports seconds and milliseconds.

css-minifier.name: CSS Minifier & Beautifier
css-minifier.description: Minify CSS to reduce file size or beautify minified CSS for readability. See size savings.

number-base-converter.name: Number Base Converter
number-base-converter.description: Convert numbers between Binary, Octal, Decimal, and Hexadecimal. Real-time conversion with validation.

csv-to-json.name: CSV to JSON Converter
csv-to-json.description: Convert CSV data to JSON format online. Supports custom delimiters, header rows, and quoted fields.

cron-parser.name: Cron Expression Parser
cron-parser.description: Parse and understand cron expressions. See human-readable descriptions and next execution times.

html-minifier.name: HTML Minifier & Beautifier
html-minifier.description: Minify HTML to reduce file size or beautify minified HTML for readability. Remove comments and whitespace.

js-minifier.name: JavaScript Minifier & Beautifier
js-minifier.description: Minify JavaScript to reduce file size or beautify minified JS for readability. Remove comments and whitespace.

sql-formatter.name: SQL Formatter
sql-formatter.description: Format and beautify SQL queries online. Indent keywords, align clauses, and make your SQL readable.

json-to-csv.name: JSON to CSV Converter
json-to-csv.description: Convert JSON arrays to CSV format online. Supports custom delimiters and download.

ip-address-info.name: IP Address Info
ip-address-info.description: View your public IP address, user agent, screen resolution, and browser information.

password-generator.name: Password Generator
password-generator.description: Generate strong, random passwords with customizable length and character types. Password strength indicator included.

uuid-generator.name: UUID Generator
uuid-generator.description: Generate UUID v4 identifiers online. Bulk generation, uppercase/lowercase options, with or without hyphens.

meta-tag-generator.name: Meta Tag Generator
meta-tag-generator.description: Generate HTML meta tags for SEO. Create Open Graph, Twitter Card, and standard meta tags with a live Google preview.

aspect-ratio-calculator.name: Aspect Ratio Calculator
aspect-ratio-calculator.description: Calculate and convert aspect ratios. Lock ratios, use common presets like 16:9 and 4:3, and find matching resolutions.

emoji-picker.name: Emoji Picker & Search
emoji-picker.description: Browse, search, and copy emojis by category. Click any emoji to copy it to your clipboard instantly.

gradient-generator.name: CSS Gradient Generator
gradient-generator.description: Create beautiful linear and radial CSS gradients with multiple color stops. Preview in real-time and copy the CSS code.

placeholder-image.name: Placeholder Image Generator
placeholder-image.description: Generate placeholder images with custom dimensions, colors, and text. Download as PNG or JPEG.

text-to-binary.name: Text to Binary Converter
text-to-binary.description: Convert text to binary, hexadecimal, or octal and vice versa. Multiple encoding formats supported.

rot13-encoder.name: ROT13 Encoder/Decoder
rot13-encoder.description: Encode and decode text using ROT13 Caesar cipher. Supports custom shift values from 1 to 25.

pomodoro-timer.name: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro-timer.description: Focus timer using the Pomodoro Technique. 25-minute work sessions with 5-minute breaks. Sound notifications and session tracking.

json-to-yaml.name: JSON to YAML Converter
json-to-yaml.description: Convert JSON to YAML and YAML to JSON online. Bidirectional conversion with proper formatting.

xml-formatter.name: XML Formatter & Validator
xml-formatter.description: Format, minify, and validate XML online. Beautify XML with custom indentation and validate tag matching.

markdown-to-html.name: Markdown to HTML Converter
markdown-to-html.description: Convert Markdown to HTML with a live preview. Supports headings, bold, italic, links, code blocks, and more.

favicon-generator.name: Favicon Generator
favicon-generator.description: Upload an image and generate favicons in multiple sizes (16x16 to 512x512). Download individually or as a ZIP.

svg-to-png.name: SVG to PNG Converter
svg-to-png.description: Convert SVG to PNG with custom dimensions online. Paste SVG code or upload a file, set width and height.

text-to-speech.name: Text to Speech
text-to-speech.description: Convert text to speech using the Web Speech API. Choose from available voices, adjust speed, pitch, and volume.

character-counter.name: Character Counter
character-counter.description: Count characters, words, sentences, paragraphs, and lines. View reading time, speaking time, and character frequency.

find-and-replace.name: Find and Replace
find-and-replace.description: Find and replace text with regex support, case sensitivity, and whole word matching. Highlights all matches in real-time.

yaml-to-json.name: YAML to JSON Converter
yaml-to-json.description: Parse and convert YAML to JSON online with validation and error highlighting. Supports nested objects and arrays.

http-status-codes.name: HTTP Status Code Reference
http-status-codes.description: Searchable reference of all HTTP status codes with descriptions and categories (1xx-5xx). Filter by category or search by code.

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, speed, digital storage, time, and area. Metric and imperial supported.

invoice-generator.name: Invoice Generator
invoice-generator.description: Create professional invoices with company details, line items, tax calculation, and totals. Download as PDF.

morse-code.name: Morse Code Translator
morse-code.description: Convert text to Morse code and Morse code to text. Includes audio playback, reference chart, and bidirectional translation.

random-text-generator.name: Random Text Generator
random-text-generator.description: Generate random words, sentences, paragraphs, names, email addresses, and phone numbers for testing and mockups.

text-repeater.name: Text Repeater
text-repeater.description: Repeat text N times with custom separator, prefix, suffix, and numbering options.

video-to-gif.name: Video to GIF
video-to-gif.description: Extract animated clips from video files. Configure start time, duration, FPS, and resolution.

color-palette-generator.name: Color Palette Generator
color-palette-generator.description: Generate harmonious color palettes from a base color. Supports complementary, analogous, triadic, and tetradic harmonies.

backlink-generator.name: Backlink Generator
backlink-generator.description: Generate link code in HTML, Markdown, BBCode, Textile, Wiki, and reStructuredText formats.

json-path-finder.name: JSON Path Finder
json-path-finder.description: Navigate JSON with an interactive tree view. Click nodes to find their path. Query values by path expression.

chmod-calculator.name: Chmod Calculator
chmod-calculator.description: Interactive Unix file permissions calculator. Convert between octal (755) and symbolic (rwxr-xr-x) notation.

markdown-table-generator.name: Markdown Table Generator
markdown-table-generator.description: Create Markdown tables with a visual editor. Add rows, columns, set alignment, and copy output.

regex-library.name: Regex Pattern Library
regex-library.description: Curated library of common regex patterns for emails, URLs, dates, numbers, and more. Test patterns inline.

image-to-base64.name: Image to Base64
image-to-base64.description: Convert images to Base64 strings. Output as Data URI, raw Base64, CSS background, or HTML img tag.

base64-to-image.name: Base64 to Image
base64-to-image.description: Decode Base64 strings back to images. Auto-detects JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, and SVG formats.

text-truncator.name: Text Truncator
text-truncator.description: Truncate text by characters, words, or sentences with customizable ellipsis position and whole-word preservation.

market-tracker.name: Market Price Tracker
market-tracker.description: Track live prices of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Gold, and Oil. View 24-hour changes, convert between currencies (USD, AZN, EUR), and see market summaries.

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: About Vaxtim Yoxdu - A free AI online tools platform.
about.motto: No time to waste — we are here for you
about.description: Vaxtim Yoxdu is a platform offering quick news summaries in Azerbaijani and free online tools. Our goal is to save your time: delivering important news in a clear and concise way while offering free tools to simplify your daily tasks.
about.missionDescription: We believe that quality information and useful tools should be free and easily accessible for everyone. No registration required, no hidden fees. Just powerful tools that work and news summaries that save your time.
about.privacyDescription: Most of our tools run directly in your browser — your data never leaves your device. For AI-powered tools, your data is processed securely and never stored.
about.contactDescription: Have ideas or suggestions? Feel free to write to us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Vaxtim Yoxdu online tools platform.
privacy.collectDescription: We collect minimal information to provide our services. Client-side tools process data entirely in your browser - nothing is sent to our servers.
privacy.aiDescription: For AI-powered tools, your input text is sent to our secure servers for processing. We do not store, log, or use your input data for training purposes. Data is deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.analyticsDescription: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site. This collects anonymous usage data such as page views, browser type, and general location.
privacy.advertisingDescription: We display advertisements through Google AdSense and other partners. These services may use cookies to serve relevant ads based on your browsing activity.
privacy.cookiesDescription: We use essential cookies for site functionality and third-party cookies for analytics and advertising. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.contactDescription: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for the Vaxtim Yoxdu online tools platform.
terms.acceptDescription: By using Vaxtim Yoxdu, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.useDescription: Our tools are provided free of charge for personal and commercial use. You may not use our services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
terms.limitationsDescription: AI-powered tools have usage limits to ensure fair access for all users. We reserve the right to restrict access to users who abuse our services.
terms.disclaimerDescription: Our tools are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for any data loss or damages resulting from the use of our services.
terms.changesDescription: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

footer.description: Quick news summaries and free online tools. No registration needed.
